description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull requests, and a weekly schedule. The workflow should have three jobs: build-ubuntu, build-osx, and build-windows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest respectively). For each job, install dependencies, generate a project using CMake, build, and test. Additionally, for build-osx and build-windows, create an installer and for build-windows, upload it as an artifact.
